title: Convolutional Neural Networks for Diabetic Retinopathy Detection
abstract: This paper presents a CNN-based pipeline for classifying retinal fundus images into diabetic retinopathy severity levels.

title: Lightweight Intrusion Detection for IoT Sensor Networks
abstract: We propose an anomaly-based intrusion detection method for constrained IoT nodes in wireless sensor networks.

title: Cost-Based Query Optimization in Distributed Relational Databases
abstract: The study improves execution planning and join strategies for distributed SQL systems under heterogeneous workloads.

title: Transformer-Based Thai Academic Abstract Summarization
abstract: This work applies transformer architectures to generate concise Thai summaries from long academic abstracts.

title: A Controlled Study on Code Review Practices in Student Capstone Teams
abstract: We analyze defect density and delivery time under different code review policies in software engineering education projects.
